titleStmt.title: SII 16.237: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 237. (A.R. No. 334 of 1922.) SŌMPĀLEM, MADANAPALLI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Kōṭa Chauḍēśvari temple.
This is dated Śaka 1480, Kāḷayukti, Māgha ba. 14, Śivarātri, corresponding to 1559 A.D., January 6, Monday °30.

It records the gift of the alugu-rūkalu out of the māhārācha-tēvalu collected in Sōṁpalle-agrahāra in Rāmagiri-durga in Penugoṇḍa-Mārjavāḍa and Udayagiri-Mārjavāḍa to goddess Chavuṁḍēśvaramma of Sōmpalle, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jillēḷḷa Kṛishṇamarājayya-Veṅgaḷarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1480 Agunēṭi
kāḷayukti saṁvatsara māgha ba 14 sivarātri puṇyakālānanu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu ra
tnasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍaI pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahādēvayaku sōṁpallekōṭa
cavuṁḍēśvarammaku śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara jilleḷla kṛiṣṇamarājayya veṁgaḷarājuṁgāru daṁḍaṁ veṭi sa
ma¨rppiṁccina dharmaśāsanamu vudayagiri mā¨rjavāḍa penuṁgoṁḍa mā¨rjavāḍa staḷānanu rāmagiridu¨rgaṁlōni
sōṁpalle Agrahāraṁ catuśśīmalōnu mahārācatēvalanu vaccē Alugurūkalu voganāṁṭi pūjaku Ö . 1 nū
pūjakugānu [vaIsyula] vaccē rūkalu Anninni yīsivarātri puṇyakālānanu dhārapōsi Istimi
ganaka cavuṁḍēśvarammaku pūja nevēdyālaku pāruveṁṭa mahōtsavālaku dhāravōsi Istimi ganaka Iṁdku vappu
[I]ṁdulaku yavvaṁḍu ganka brāhmaṇulanū gaṁgaka¨rtanu
vadhiṁccina pāpānaṁ bōduru
cavuṁḍēśvarammaku trivācakamugānu trikaraṇaśuddhigānu dhāra vōsi Icci
na dharmaśāsanamu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
